orientation: website (JPG) orientation — 180° from the raw FITS. Cells are read on the rotated max-stack as the website displays it; the mask builder rotates back to FITS coords.
notes: Current-pointing occlusion (camera moved ~2026-06-09, settled since). Marked 2026-07-04 by peter on the 2026-07-03 max-stack in website orientation. Left tree clump: A5,A6 (bottom-left). Right tree clump: F6,G6,H6,G5,H5,H4 (bottom-right). Gutter/roofline: F1,G1,H1 (top-right). Trees move (wind) and corrupt per-patch fits; gutter is a bright static edge that yields false star candidates. Exclude all from candidate finding + pole fit + stack. Supersedes the stale 2026-06-09 tree/eves cells (pre-move pointing).
pole_prior_notes: PLATE-SOLVED 2026-07-02 (full-res Bayer px). Solved WCS on a frame-centre short-window derot: binned pole (1176,503) × 2 = (2352,1006) full-res; plate scale 0.02211 deg/full-res-px. Camera is FIXED — use this as a strong/fixed prior, do NOT re-fit fresh each night (the fresh fit drifts ~28px and breaks the solve). See memory project-astrocam-wcs-2026-07-01. The old (1945,1823) was the pre-move pointing.
